# surgeist-css public API
# generated by Surgeist public API artifact tooling

pub mod surgeist_css
pub struct surgeist_css::Error
impl surgeist_css::Error
pub const fn surgeist_css::Error::column(&self) -> u32
pub const fn surgeist_css::Error::line(&self) -> u32
pub fn surgeist_css::Error::message(&self) -> &str
impl core::error::Error for surgeist_css::Error
impl core::fmt::Display for surgeist_css::Error
pub fn surgeist_css::Error::fmt(&self, f: &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
pub fn surgeist_css::parse_sheet(input: &str) -> surgeist_css::Result<surgeist_style::sheet::Sheet>
pub type surgeist_css::Result<T> = core::result::Result<T, surgeist_css::Error>
